CustomField.formula: IF( AND(CONTAINS(TEXT(Strategic_Pod__c),"NAL"), NAL_Priority__c = TRUE, CONTAINS(TEXT(Enrichment_Source__c),"Enrichment Team"), Unqualified_account_flag__c = FALSE), "NAL'S TOP Priority Enriched", IF(AND(CONTAINS(TEXT(Strategic_Pod__c),"NAL"), NAL_Priority__c = TRUE, OR(NOT(CONTAINS(TEXT(Enrichment_Source__c),"Enrichment Team")),TEXT(Enrichment_Source__c)=""), Unqualified_account_flag__c = FALSE), "NAL'S TOP Priority Not Enriched", IF(AND(TEXT(Strategic_Pod__c)<>"", CONTAINS(TEXT(Enrichment_Source__c),"Enrichment Team"), Unqualified_account_flag__c = FALSE), "Priority Enriched", IF(AND(TEXT(Strategic_Pod__c)<>"", OR(NOT(CONTAINS(TEXT(Enrichment_Source__c),"Enrichment Team")),TEXT(Enrichment_Source__c)=""), Unqualified_account_flag__c = FALSE), "Priority Not Enriched", ""))))
CustomField.label: Priority Banner Logic
